_comment: Example payloads for create-template.js — three common template types

text_with_variables._description: node scripts/create-template.js --name order_confirmation --category MARKETING --body 'Hello {{1}}, your order #{{2}} has shipped.' --variables '{"1":"John","2":"12345"}'
text_with_variables.name: order_confirmation

image_with_body_and_buttons._description: node scripts/create-template.js --name promo_banner --category MARKETING --body 'Check out our sale, {{1}}!' --variables '{"1":"Jane"}' --type image --media-url 'https://example.com/banner.jpg' --buttons '[{"type":"Quick Reply","text":"Shop Now"},{"type":"Quick Reply","text":"No Thanks"}]'
image_with_body_and_buttons.name: promo_banner
image_with_body_and_buttons._note: media_url is auto-uploaded by the script — pass a publicly accessible URL

authentication.name: verify_otp
authentication._note: Do NOT pass --body for AUTHENTICATION templates. Xano auto-generates: 'Your verification code is {{1}}. Do not share this code. (Expires in 10 minutes.)'
